requirement_topic.en: EAC Declaration of Conformity — TR EAEU 037/2016, TR CU 020/2011, TR EAEU 004/2011 (EAC Mark + Local Authorised Importer)
requirement_topic.zh: EAC合格声明——TR EAEU 037/2016、TR CU 020/2011、TR EAEU 004/2011（EAC标志 + 当地授权进口商）
requirement_topic.zht: EAC合格聲明——TR EAEU 037/2016、TR CU 020/2011、TR EAEU 004/2011（EAC標誌 + 當地授權進口商）

summary.en: Wireless devices (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, IoT, cellular-enabled) placed on the Russian market must carry the EAC mark (Евразийское соответствие — Eurasian Conformity) and be supported by an EAC Declaration of Conformity issued by a legal entity registered in an EAEU member state. The declaration must cover three intersecting EAEU technical regulations: TR EAEU 037/2016 (on the safety of electronic equipment, which replaced GOST R 51321 and TR CU 004/2011 for radio apparatus); TR CU 020/2011 (on electromagnetic compatibility of technical products); and TR EAEU 004/2011 (on low-voltage electrical equipment safety, applicable to mains-powered or battery-powered devices above defined voltage thresholds). Conformity assessment is carried out by an accredited EAC certification body or through a self-declaration procedure using test results from an accredited laboratory. The applicant for the EAC Declaration must be a legal person or individual entrepreneur registered in an EAEU member state — a Chinese manufacturer cannot hold the declaration directly without a local authorised representative. The EAC mark must be visibly affixed to the product, its packaging, and the accompanying documentation. CE marking, China CCC, and FCC authorisation are not recognised as equivalent and do not substitute for EAC conformity assessment.
summary.zh: 投放俄罗斯市场的无线设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、物联网、具备蜂窝功能的设备）须加贴EAC标志（Евразийское соответствие，欧亚合格），并由在EAEU成员国注册的法律实体出具EAC合格声明作为支撑。该声明须涵盖三项相互交叉的EAEU技术法规：TR EAEU 037/2016（电子设备安全，取代了GOST R 51321及适用于无线电设备的TR CU 004/2011）；TR CU 020/2011（技术产品的电磁兼容性）；以及TR EAEU 004/2011（低压电气设备安全，适用于超过规定电压阈值的市电或电池供电设备）。合规评估由经认可的EAC认证机构进行，或通过使用经认可实验室出具的测试报告自我声明完成。EAC合格声明的申请方须为在EAEU成员国注册的法人或个体企业主——中国制造商不得在无当地授权代表的情况下直接持有该声明。EAC标志须清晰贴附于产品、包装及随附文件上。CE标志、中国CCC及FCC授权不被视为等同，不可替代EAC合规评估。
summary.zht: 投放俄羅斯市場的無線設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、物聯網、具備蜂窩功能的設備）須加貼EAC標誌（Евразийское соответствие，歐亞合格），並由在EAEU成員國登記的法律實體出具EAC合格聲明作為支撐。該聲明須涵蓋三項相互交叉的EAEU技術法規：TR EAEU 037/2016（電子設備安全，取代了GOST R 51321及適用於無線電設備的TR CU 004/2011）；TR CU 020/2011（技術產品的電磁相容性）；以及TR EAEU 004/2011（低壓電氣設備安全，適用於超過規定電壓閾值的市電或電池供電設備）。合規評估由經認可的EAC認證機構進行，或通過使用經認可實驗室出具的測試報告自我聲明完成。EAC合格聲明的申請方須為在EAEU成員國登記的法人或個體企業主——中國製造商不得在無當地授權代表的情況下直接持有該聲明。EAC標誌須清晰貼附於產品、包裝及隨附文件上。CE標誌、中國CCC及FCC授權不被視為等同，不可替代EAC合規評估。

standards_or_laws: TR EAEU 037/2016 — Technical Regulation of the Eurasian Economic Union on the Safety of Electronic Equipment (radio apparatus and telecommunications terminal equipment)
TR CU 020/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Customs Union on Electromagnetic Compatibility of Technical Products
TR EAEU 004/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Eurasian Economic Union on Low-voltage Electrical Equipment Safety
Decision of the Council of the Eurasian Economic Commission No. 44 (2013) — Unified list of products subject to mandatory conformity assessment within the EAEU

summary.en: Chinese wireless devices for the domestic market typically hold MIIT/SRRC radio type approval for frequency use, CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under GB 4943.1 (electrical safety for IT equipment) and/or GB 9254 (EMC emissions), and — for terminal equipment connecting to public telecoms networks — a MIIT network access licence (NAL). These approvals are issued by Chinese authorities (SRRC under MIIT; CNCA for CCC) and are recognised only within China. They provide no equivalence for EAEU EAC conformity assessment and are not accepted by Russian customs or market surveillance authorities.
summary.zh: 面向国内市场的中国无线设备通常持有MIIT/SRRC频率使用无线电型号核准、依据GB 4943.1（IT设备电气安全）和/或GB 9254（电磁兼容辐射）的CCC（中国强制认证），以及——对于连接公共电信网络的终端设备——MIIT网络接入许可（NAL）。上述核准由中国主管机构颁发（MIIT下属SRRC；CNCA负责CCC），仅在中国境内受到认可，对EAEU EAC合规评估不具等同效力，不被俄罗斯海关或市场监督机构接受。
summary.zht: 面向國內市場的中國無線設備通常持有MIIT/SRRC頻率使用無線電型號核准、依據GB 4943.1（IT設備電氣安全）和/或GB 9254（電磁相容輻射）的CCC（中國強制認證），以及——對於連接公共電信網絡的終端設備——MIIT網絡接入許可（NAL）。上述核准由中國主管機構頒發（MIIT下屬SRRC；CNCA負責CCC），僅在中國境內受到認可，對EAEU EAC合規評估不具等同效力，不被俄羅斯海關或市場監督機構接受。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — State Radio Regulation Committee (SRRC) under MIIT, frequency allocation and use licensing for wireless devices in China
CCC — China Compulsory Certification under GB 4943.1 (Safety of IT equipment) administered by CNCA
GB 9254 — Information technology equipment: Radio disturbance characteristics limits and methods of measurement (EMC emissions, CCC/self-declaration)
MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — required for terminal equipment connecting to public telecoms networks in China

gap.en: Chinese SRRC, CCC, and NAL approvals are China-only; none carry any legal weight in Russia or the EAEU. An EAC Declaration of Conformity under the three applicable EAEU technical regulations (TR EAEU 037/2016, TR CU 020/2011, TR EAEU 004/2011) must be obtained independently via a conformity assessment body or accredited laboratory in an EAEU member state. The declaration holder must be a legal entity registered in an EAEU member state, meaning a Chinese exporter without a registered Russian or EAEU-resident importer cannot hold the declaration. The EAC mark must appear on the product and packaging. All product documentation (user manual, labelling) must be in Russian. CE marking is explicitly not recognised. The gap is total: no mutual recognition or equivalence pathway exists.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC、CCC及NAL核准仅在中国有效，在俄罗斯或EAEU均不具任何法律效力。必须通过EAEU成员国的合规评估机构或经认可实验室，依据三项适用EAEU技术法规（TR EAEU 037/2016、TR CU 020/2011、TR EAEU 004/2011）独立获取EAC合格声明。声明持有方须为在EAEU成员国注册的法律实体，这意味着未设立俄罗斯或EAEU居民进口商的中国出口商无法持有该声明。EAC标志须显示于产品及包装上。所有产品文件（用户手册、标签）须以俄语书写。CE标志明确不被承认。差距是全面性的：不存在相互认可或等同性路径。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC、CCC及NAL核准僅在中國有效，在俄羅斯或EAEU均不具任何法律效力。必須通過EAEU成員國的合規評估機構或經認可實驗室，依據三項適用EAEU技術法規（TR EAEU 037/2016、TR CU 020/2011、TR EAEU 004/2011）獨立獲取EAC合格聲明。聲明持有方須為在EAEU成員國登記的法律實體，這意味著未設立俄羅斯或EAEU居民進口商的中國出口商無法持有該聲明。EAC標誌須顯示於產品及包裝上。所有產品文件（用戶手冊、標籤）須以俄語書寫。CE標誌明確不被承認。差距是全面性的：不存在相互認可或等同性路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC Declaration of Conformity and EAC mark are legally required for wireless devices placed on the Russian (and EAEU) market under TR EAEU 037/2016, TR CU 020/2011, and TR EAEU 004/2011; local authorised importer or representative registered in an EAEU member state is mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval required for wireless devices sold in China; CCC certification under GB 4943.1 mandatory for in-scope IT equipment; MIIT NAL required for public-network terminal equipment

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — Official EAEU Legal Portal

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An EAC Declaration of Conformity covering TR EAEU 037/2016 (radio equipment), TR CU 020/2011 (EMC), and TR EAEU 004/2011 (low-voltage safety) is mandatory for wireless devices entering the Russian market. The EAC mark must be affixed to the product and packaging. A legal entity registered in an EAEU member state must hold the declaration — a Chinese manufacturer without a registered local importer cannot satisfy this requirement. Chinese SRRC, CCC, CE, and FCC documentation do not substitute. Verify current EAEU technical regulation versions and accredited body lists with the Eurasian Economic Commission before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入俄罗斯市场的无线设备须持有涵盖TR EAEU 037/2016（无线电设备）、TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）及TR EAEU 004/2011（低压安全）的EAC合格声明，此为强制要求。EAC标志须贴附于产品及包装上。声明须由在EAEU成员国注册的法律实体持有——无当地注册进口商的中国制造商无法满足此要求。中国SRRC、CCC、CE及FCC文件不可替代。出货前请向欧亚经济委员会核实现行EAEU技术法规版本及经认可机构名单。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入俄羅斯市場的無線設備須持有涵蓋TR EAEU 037/2016（無線電設備）、TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）及TR EAEU 004/2011（低壓安全）的EAC合格聲明，此為強制要求。EAC標誌須貼附於產品及包裝上。聲明須由在EAEU成員國登記的法律實體持有——無當地登記進口商的中國製造商無法滿足此要求。中國SRRC、CCC、CE及FCC文件不可替代。出貨前請向歐亞經濟委員會核實現行EAEU技術法規版本及經認可機構名單。
